title: avenula pratensis subsp. hirtifolia
intro: Avenula pratensis subsp. hirtifolia, also known as rough oat grass or hairy oat grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and parts of Asia, belonging to the genus Avenula in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Avenula pratensis subsp. hirtifolia include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting immune function. Avenula pratensis subsp. hirtifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
